benefits.description: Helping with mitochondrial damage, facilitating mitophagy system optimization

protocol_notes: User sourced raw powder for approximately $200 for 500mg. Planning total dose of 500mg. Mentions SS-31 should be cycled, recommending once per year or every couple of years for maintenance at 100-200mg per cycle. Notes that mitophagy process takes time. Severity of condition suggests effects will take longer to manifest.
